name: Money As Survival Air
description: Money is experienced less as wealth and more as breathing room from survival anxiety.
life_effect: Low buffer can consume attention and make creative action feel unsafe.

financial_effect.reason: survival anxiety turns money into attention pressure

name: Money As Permission To Create
description: Money is partly imagined as permission to create without asking family or institutions for approval.
life_effect: When small income appears, action momentum can rise sharply.

financial_effect.reason: creative income can unlock autonomy faster than stable income alone

name: Shame Debt Loop
description: Debt is not only a number; it becomes a shame marker that narrows perceived options.
life_effect: The person may delay asking for help or taking visible action until the shame is resolved.

financial_effect.reason: debt shame slows clean financial action

name: Optionality Seeker
description: The person wants money mainly because it creates optionality and exit rights.
life_effect: If a small ladder is built, the intervention branch can compound; if not, freedom remains fantasy.

financial_effect.reason: optionality motive supports staged asset building
